name: Huy Nguyen
about: I am a passionate fullstack engineer with a keen interest in software development, cloud platforms and CI/CD. My goal as an engineer is to deliver comprehensive and on-point solutions for real life problems, placing an emphasis not just on result but also optimization and maintainability. I also love diving deep into the inner workings and fundamental concepts of a technology at use, whether it is a library, framework, tools or an entire architecture with applied algorithms and design patterns, I strive to understand how they work to my best ability.

focusAreas.title: Fullstack Development
focusAreas.description: Building end-to-end applications with a focus on clean, maintainable code.

focusAreas.title: Cloud & CI/CD
focusAreas.description: Deploying and automating with modern cloud platforms and delivery pipelines.

focusAreas.title: Architecture & Optimization
focusAreas.description: Designing systems with the right algorithms, patterns and performance in mind.
